titleStmt.title: SII 8.749: original edition by K.V. Subrahmanya Aiyer
No. 749. (A.R. No. 433 of 1903). ON THE EAST WALL OF THE FIRST PRAKARA OF THE SAME TEMPLE.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . pūmevuvaḷar tiruppon mārvu puṇara nāmevu kalaimakaḷ nilam peritu ciṟappa vicaiyamāmakaḷ taṉ ṉirupuyat tiruppa Icai
yiṉcelvi Eṇṭicai viḷaṅka nirupar vantiṟaiñca nīṇilamaṭantayait tirumaṇam puṇarntu cirvaḷar
tarumaṇimuṭi kavittanta Aṇimuṭi cūṭi mallaiñālattup palluyirkkellām Ellaiyi liṉpam yiyalvinil le
yta veṇkuṭai niḻaṟṟac ceṅkolocci vāḻi pallūḻi A ppa cempon vira siṁ hāsa nattu puvanamuḻutuṭaiyā
ḷoṭum viṟṟiruntaruḷiya kovirājakecaripanmarāna tiripuvanacakkaravarttikaḷ śrī kolottuṅkacoḻatevaṟku Iyāṇṭu Iraṇ
ṭāvatu Irājarāja vaḷanāṭṭup paṉaiyūrnāṭṭu vāvalūrnāṭṭut tevatāṉam tiruvāmāttūr Āḷuṭaiya Aḻakiyatevar
koyilil tiruppatiyam pāṭivarum kuruṭarkaḷait tavittuPortions in lines 7 to 9 have been erased by light chiselling.nam tevārattu tiruppatiyam pāṭum poyyātacevaṭi tevakaṇātanāna
Irājarājap piccaṉukkum Ivan vaṟkattārkkum Ikkoyiṟ tiruppatiyakkāṇiyāṉa Ivvūr mutalkāṇiyāka kuṭuttom
Ivan vaṟkattāraiyumey Iṭṭut tiruppatiyam pāṭuvittukkoṇṭu muṉpilāṇṭukaḷ kuruṭarkaḷukku viṭṭuvarum nivanta
ppaṭi Ivarkaḷukkum viṭṭuk kalveṭṭuka venṟu tiruvāymoḻintu tirumukam pira- sā tañceytu vantamaiyiṟ Ikkuruṭar
kaḷ muṉpilāṇṭukaḷ Anupavattiṉpaṭi pāṭivaruṅ kuruṭarkaḷ per patinaṟuvarum Ivarkaḷukku kaṇkāṭṭuvār Iruvarum Ā
kap per patineṇmarkku perāl nellu patakkāka nāḷoṉṟukku nellu mukkalamāka nāḷ munṉūṟṟaṟupatukku nellu Āyi
ratteṇpatiṉ kalamum puṭavaimutalukku perāl kācu Oṉṟāka kācu patineṭṭukku kācu Oṉṟukku nellu Irupatin kalamāka va
nta nellu Āyirattu nānūṟṟu nāṟpatiṉ kalattukku veli Oṉṟukku nellu nūṟṟiru
patiṉ kalamāka Ittevar tevatānam kaṭuvanūril viṭṭa nilam panniruveli Innilam panniruveliyum kāṇiyāka Ivvūr nila
ṅkalantapaṭiye kaikkoṇṭu Ittiruppatiyam pāṭuvār per patineṇmarum muṉṟu sa ntiyum vantu tiruppatiyam
viṇṇappañceytu munpilāṇṭukaḷ Ikkuruṭarkaḷ nilaṅ kaikkoṇṭu ceytuvarumpaṭiye Ittiruppatiyam
viṇṇappañceyvārum ceytuvarakkaṭavarkaḷāka Ippoyyātacevaṭi tevarkaṇātanāna rarajarājap piccaṉukkum Ivan vaṟ
kattārkkuṅ kāṇiyāka kuṭuttom .
Digital edition of SII 8.749 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Dorotea Operato.
